description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding wooden shelving unit with a natural brown finish and a simple, modern design. The structure features an open front with two main compartments: a large open shelf on one side and two smaller stacked shelves on the other, providing versatile storage options. The sides and top are solid panels, while the back appears open, allowing for easy access and cable management if used for electronics. The wood grain texture is visible throughout, giving it a rustic yet contemporary appearance suitable for urban environments such as living rooms, offices, or waiting areas. The unit stands on four short feet, slightly elevating it from the ground. There are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels, emphasizing its open and accessible design.
description: A rectangular, open wooden shelving unit with a natural brown finish, featuring one large and two smaller shelves. Its simple, modern design is suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelving layout with one large compartment and two smaller shelves on the right.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wooden panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, highlighting the open shelves and overall structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing a solid wooden panel with no openings.
